name: ExtensionPackagedProductDefinition_Description
title: R5: Textual description. Note that this is not the name of the package or product (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PackagedProductDefinition.description` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PackagedProductDefinition.description` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PackagedProductDefinition.description` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PackagedProductDefinition.description` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `PackagedProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `PackagedProductDefinition.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
